projects.statusSummary:
# Lead Scraper — Status

## Overview
Lead-gen engine for BuiltSimple. Finds local businesses without websites (or with bad ones), enriches contact info, and automates personalized outreach via email and text.

## Current State (Mar 7, 2026)
- **6,875 leads** in SQLite DB across 50-mile KC metro radius
- **1,294 without websites** (prime targets)
- **187 with verified email addresses**
- **130 Gmail drafts ready** to send (filtered for sites that actually need help)
- **1,037 phone-only businesses** exported to CSV for text outreach
- Not deployed (runs locally — SQLite won't work on Vercel)

#

projects.statusSummary:
# Meta Tutor — Status

## Last Updated
2026-03-04

## Current State
- Live at `https://meta-tutor.vercel.app`
- GitHub: `https://github.com/cascone26/meta-tutor.git`
- Built for Cris's Thomistic Metaphysics course
- Google login required for all routes
- Uses Claude Haiku (via `CLAUDE_MODEL` env var) with rate limiting (75/day) and prompt caching

## What It Is
Study app with a strict no-cheat constraint — all features force active recall. No passive reading or answer lookup.

## Pages (15 routes)
- `/` — Landing/home
- `/login` — Google OAuth login
- `/dashboard` — Main hub
- `/study` — Activ

projects.statusSummary:
# AtlasBox — Status

## Last Updated
2026-03-04

## Current State
- Live at `https://atlasbox.vercel.app`
- GitHub: `https://github.com/cascone26/mini-games.git`
- Vercel: `cascone26s-projects/atlasbox` (auto-deploys from GitHub)
- Single file: `index.html` (~9,986 lines, all HTML/CSS/JS inline)
- Cloud sync via Supabase (profiles, leaderboard, cross-device save)

## What It Is
"Shut the Box" / "Close the Box" dice game built for Atlas, Jacob's 5-year-old nephew. Designed for a kid who can't read, knows numbers but not math well. Educational goal: subtly teach letters, numbers, and basic math.

projects.title: Forgemaster / Roblox MCP
projects.notes: Roblox Studio integration.
projects.statusSummary:
# Forgemaster — Status

## What It Is
Roblox game factory engine. Builds complete, playable games in Roblox Studio via the MCP bridge plugin, or generates .rbxlx files offline.

## Quick Start
```bash
cd ~/projects/forgemaster

# Check Studio connection
node forge.js status

# Build a tycoon in Studio
node forge.js build tycoon --theme medieval --name "Dragon Castle Tycoon"

# Build an obby
node forge.js build obby --theme candy --name "Sugar Rush Obby"

# Build a simulator
node forge.js build simulator --theme scifi --name "Galaxy Clicker"

# Generate offline .rbxlx file (no Studio needed)
no

# The Faithful Minute — YouTube Shorts Channel

## Overview
Faceless Catholic YouTube Shorts channel. AI-narrated, real art visuals, fully automated pipeline.

**Channel name:** The Faithful Minute
**Format:** 60-90 second Shorts (start short-form, add long-form later)
**Voice:** Edge-tts (free, unlimited) — en-US-AndrewMultilingualNeural (warm, confident)
**Visuals:** Public domain religious masterpieces from Wikimedia Commons
**Cost:** $0/month

- **Images:** Real high-quality paintings/art ONLY. No AI text-on-dark-background frames. Blurred-background technique (f

ideas.name: COBO Phase 9
ideas.description: self-improving autonomous agent. Always maximizing, always learning, builds its own tools when it identifies repetitive patterns. DONE = never done, always evolving.

ideas.name: Voice conversation mode (NEXT PRIORITY)
ideas.description: talk to COBO naturally like ChatGPT voice mode. Full two-way voice PWA: mic button records, transcribes, sends to COBO, plays back response via TTS. Foundation for all hardware (AirPods, car Bluetooth, smart glasses). Phone is the bridge for everything.

ideas.name: Micro-SaaS factory
ideas.description: agent that researches underserved niches, builds simple tools (Next.js + Vercel), deploys them, monitors for traction. Generates and executes on business ideas autonomously.

ideas.name: Content engine that compounds
ideas.description: researches what target audience is actually searching for, creates SEO-optimized content, publishes, monitors rankings over days, doubles down on what climbs, kills what doesn't. Gets smarter over time.

ideas.name: Live metrics TV
ideas.description: old iPad or cheap monitor showing LessonDraft signups, revenue, traffic. Needs hardware.

ideas.name: Menubar LessonDraft MRR display
ideas.description: live MRR in the menu bar. Wait until there are actual subscribers.

ideas.name: AI voice assistant on a speaker
ideas.description: custom voice assistant on hardware. Needs budget.

ideas.name: Pi dashboard display
ideas.description: physical always-on screen. ~$50-80 for Pi + screen.

ideas.name: Personal life API
ideas.description: unified API layer over Git, Stripe, Gmail, calendar. Cool but Claude already does this interactively.

ideas.name: Smart file router
ideas.description: can just ask Claude to do it

ideas.name: Revenue autopilot
ideas.description: not what Jacob is looking for
